name: Goat Cheese and Sundried Tomato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the dressing by placing 2 teaspoons of Dijon mustard in a bowl and add 2 tablespoons of red wine vinegar. Beat with a wire whisk until combined. Slowly add 6 tablespoons of vegetable oil while continuing to beat. Add fresh ground pepper.
2. Divide the dressing evenly between two bowls. Toss the radiccio leaves into one bowl and the Bibb lettuce leaves into the other. Arrange a ring of radiccio around the outer edge of each plate. Place the Bibb lettuce in the center. Crumble the goat cheese over the lettuce. Distribute the sundried tomatoes evenly over the goat cheese on each plate.
